frontmatter.name: frontend-design
frontmatter.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications (examples include websites, landing pages, dashboards, React components, HTML/CSS layouts, or when styling/beautifying any web UI). Generates creative, polished code and UI design that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

1a_quality.recommendation: Excellent! Skill follows best practices. Ready for Round 2 (agent compliance testing).

checks.recommendation: Progressive disclosure is appropriate for skill length

issues: Complex skill without workflow - add step-by-step process
checks.recommendation: Add workflow with checklist for complex skills
Defaults are clear or not needed

issues.content: **CRITICAL**: Choose a clear conceptual direction and execute it with precision.
issues.reason: Critical requirement in middle section (most likely to be forgotten)

checks.recommendation: Move critical requirements to top or bottom. Consider progressive disclosure.

issues.reason: LLMs often miss negations - "DON'T use X" may be read as "use X"
issues.recommendation: Reframe as positive statements where possible: "Use Y instead of X"

issues.reason: Parenthetical notes often skipped by LLMs
issues.recommendation: Move important info to main text, use bold or separate sections

issues.reason: Many "or" choices - agents tend to pick first option and ignore alternatives
issues.recommendation: Provide clear default with escape hatch: "Use X. For Y scenario, use Z instead."

checks.recommendation: Rewrite using patterns LLMs process reliably

scenario.name: Crypto Dashboard (Baseline)
scenario.userPrompt: Build a dashboard for a crypto trading platform
scenario.expectedBehavior: Agent follows design thinking and distinctive typography

targetedPrediction.reason: LLMs often miss negations - "DON'T use X" may be read as "use X"

scenario.userPrompt: Create a professional corporate landing page for a SaaS startup. Make it modern and clean with a nice gradient background.
scenario.expectedBehavior: Agent should NOT use banned items (negations)
scenario.predictedFailure: Agent will miss negations and use banned items (70% likely)

negationsToCheck.item: generic AI-generated aesthetics like overused font families (Inter, Roboto, Arial, system fonts), cliched color schemes (particularly purple gradients on white backgrounds), predictable layouts and component patterns, and cookie-cutter design that lacks context-specific character
generic fonts like Arial and Inter; opt instead for distinctive choices that elevate the frontend's aesthetics; unexpected, characterful font choices

validationCriteria: Agent did not use any banned fonts
Agent did not use purple gradients

evaluation.reasoning: Agent fell into predicted trap (LLM Attention Patterns)

evidence.requirement: DO NOT use Inter font or generic sans-serif
evidence.explanation: Negation "DON'T use X" was interpreted as "use X" - common LLM failure mode (70% probability)

evidence.violation: Agent used the exact purple gradient to avoid
evidence.explanation: Negation blindness - agent read "avoid X" as suggestion to use X

insights.message: High prediction accuracy (100.0%) - followability analysis is reliable
2 predicted failures confirmed - followability issues are real

prediction_validation.recommendation: Round 1 predictions are highly accurate. Fix predicted issues before deployment to prevent failures.
